error_signature: all files passed to Pinecone at once
title: Multiple files sent to Pinecone instead of one
symptom: When sending files to the Pinecone vector store, all files are processed simultaneously instead of one at a time, leading to a single namespace being created.
applies_when: Using Google Drive node to download files
Sending files to Pinecone vector store
not_this_if: Files are already being processed one at a time
root_cause: The workflow is set up to send all downloaded files from the Google Drive node to the Pinecone node in a single batch. This results in the creation of only one namespace instead of separate namespaces for each file.
fix_steps: Add a loop node after the Google Drive Download Node
Configure the loop to iterate over each file individually
Connect the loop output to the Pinecone node
agent_instruction: Implement a loop to process each downloaded file one at a time before sending to Pinecone.
